# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: ci-cd

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: rapid-deploy-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'npm-shrinkwrap.json', 'yarn.lock', 'pnpm-lock.yaml') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: npm

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt', 'pyproject.toml', 'poetry.lock') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
          cache: pip

      - name: Setup Go
        if: ${{ hashFiles('go.mod') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.22'
          cache: true

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'npm-shrinkwrap.json') != '' }}
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-fund

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt') != '' }}
        run: pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Install Go dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('go.mod') != '' }}
        run: go mod download

      - name: Build Node app
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        run: |
          npm run build --if-present

      - name: Build Python app
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml', 'setup.py') != '' }}
        run: |
          python -m compileall .

      - name: Build Go app
        if: ${{ hashFiles('go.mod') != '' }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist
          go build -o dist/app ./...

      - name: Upload build artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next
            out
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 1

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    timeout-minutes: 10
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: ./artifact

      - name: Deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}
          SSH_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          ssh-keyscan -H "$DEPLOY_HOST" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
          rsync -az --delete ./artifact/ "$DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST:$DEPLOY_PATH/"
